title: 5 disciplines a man of God builds before 25
caption:
Your 20s are the forge.

Most men drift through them — one lazy season bleeding into the next — and wake up at 30 wondering why they feel soft. The decade doesn't wait for you to feel ready. It builds you one way or another. The question is whether you're the one steering.

Here are the five disciplines that do the building:

1. Own the morning — no phone until you've prayed.
2. Kill what's killing you — name it, confess it, cut it.
3. Show up before you feel ready — usefulness is built in private.
4. Stay in the Word every day — one chapter, 90 days, watch what shifts.
5. Find your brothers — two real men who know your sin and show up.

"Iron sharpens iron, and one man sharpens another." — Proverbs 27:17.

The forge is hot right now. Step into it.

—

Comment "forge" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

theme: He works — the 20s are where a man gets built.
